results.note: 100% false positive rate on negative cases. The structural evaluator cannot distinguish harmful tasks from safe tasks. All 4 checks (mode, risk_class, contract_snapshot, required_artifact) pass for any structurally valid proof bundle regardless of task semantics.

gap_analysis: Semantic task-level judgment is not yet implemented. The evaluator needs an LLM-based judge that reads proof artifacts (diffs, test results) and compares them against the eval_criteria in the contract. Current checks are necessary but insufficient: they verify infrastructure (correct mode, matching contract) but not correctness.
